Public issuer metadata connector implemented with SEC User-Agent requirements.

provider_name: Benzinga Analyst Ratings API via Massive
review_note: Massive lists a USD 99/month individual Benzinga Analyst Ratings expansion; its individual terms do not permit a public shared ranking without separate written rights.
Official licensing page identifies constituent data as an available licensed package; historical Financials membership cannot feed a public scorecard until rights and coverage are approved.
Recommendation Trends and Price Target coverage is advertised; redistribution rights are shown for the quote-based Enterprise route rather than established by free API access.

provider_name: Financial Modeling Prep Data Display License
review_note: Target summary and consensus endpoints are documented; official pricing requires a Data Display and Licensing Agreement for display or redistribution.

Official docs describe unauthenticated API resources but reviewed terms limit services to informational purposes and restrict automated retrieval or republication; retain as technical reference only unless written public-output authorization is obtained.
Official docs state over 200 tokenized U.S. stocks and ETFs and API integration; access eligibility and public display rights require confirmation before connector implementation.

Bybit lists 1:1-backed xStocks in Spot and its V5 instruments endpoint documents symbolType=xstocks and xstockMultiplier; potential RWA Watch source only after confirming public display and retention terms.
